brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers need credibility and reassurance that Tulsi Green Tea is a legitimate, expert-backed alternative — not just a trend — making authority the strongest conversion driver.
copyOptions.visual_description: The Organica Tulsi Green Tea product is centered and sharp in the lower half of the frame, resting on softly draped natural linen fabric against a warm cream background. Dried botanical branches and herbs are arranged to the left of the product, while a rolled linen cloth sits to the right, adding earthy organic texture. Soft diffused side lighting creates gentle shadows and a calm, premium, trustworthy mood throughout the composition.
subheadlines: Organica Tulsi Green Tea is dietitian-approved for calm, focused energy — without the crash.
Backed by Ayurvedic tradition and modern nutrition science. Real energy. Zero jitters.
Thousands have made the switch. Here is exactly why nutritionists recommend it first.
